channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Opinion: Opinion | India's Oil Reserves: How Long Can They Last As Iran War Continues?
item.description: From a future energy security perspective, India will have to significantly enhance its SPR capacities from 17 days to a minimum of 45 days on land, with the possibility of another 10-15 days of SPR on sea on tankers.
item.content:encoded: From a future energy security perspective, India will have to significantly enhance its SPR capacities from 17 days to a minimum of 45 days on land, with the possibility of another 10-15 days of SPR on sea on tankers.

item.title: Strait Of Hormuz Shutdown, Oil Supply Crisis Triggers 'Red Zone' Warning
item.description: The IEA has already issued warnings about 'the most severe disruption' ever; in April agency chief Fatih Birol told CNBC: "We are facing the biggest energy security threat in history."
item.content:encoded: The IEA has already issued warnings about 'the most severe disruption' ever; in April agency chief Fatih Birol told CNBC: "We are facing the biggest energy security threat in history."

item.title: Is UAE Building Anti-Drone Shield Around Oil Facilities Amid Iran Attacks?

media:content.media:description: Oil and gas account for approximately 30 per cent of UAE's overall GDP

item.description: Iran has increasingly singled out the Emirates in its war messaging as it attacked the United States and Israeli targets in the Middle East, repeatedly targeting locations across the country, including oil facilities.
item.content:encoded: Iran has increasingly singled out the Emirates in its war messaging as it attacked the United States and Israeli targets in the Middle East, repeatedly targeting locations across the country, including oil facilities.

item.title: Putin May "Regret" Ukraine War: Xi Jinping Told Trump During Beijing Trip

media:content.media:description: Both Beijing and Washington denied the claims in the report.

item.description: Xi Jinping’s alleged comments are significant because China has publicly maintained close ties with Russia since the war began and has avoided openly criticising Vladimir Putin.
item.content:encoded: Xi Jinping’s alleged comments are significant because China has publicly maintained close ties with Russia since the war began and has avoided openly criticising Vladimir Putin.

item.title: Why Does Every Human Voice Sound Different? Scientists Explain

media:content.media:description: Scientists believe certain genes helped shape the human vocal system (Representational)

item.description: Over time, humans lost the vocal membranes and air sacs found in monkeys and apes and developed a more stable voice box.
item.content:encoded: Over time, humans lost the vocal membranes and air sacs found in monkeys and apes and developed a more stable voice box.

item.title: Owned An Android Phone Since 2017? You Might Qualify For Google's $135 Million Payout

media:content.media:description: Eligible users may be able to submit a claim once the process officially opens.

item.description: The case centres on allegations that the company collected user data without clear consent, raising fresh concerns over digital privacy and data tracking practices.
item.content:encoded: The case centres on allegations that the company collected user data without clear consent, raising fresh concerns over digital privacy and data tracking practices.

item.title: Miss Venezuela 2025 Shares Video Showing Injuries After Alleged Assault By Celebrity Stylist

media:content.media:description: Andrea del Val shared video of bloody wounds after alleged attack by stylist.

item.description: A South American beauty queen has accused her celebrity stylist of physically attacking her at the Cannes Film Festival, with the incident leaving her with facial injuries after an apparent altercation in a hotel room.
item.content:encoded: A South American beauty queen has accused her celebrity stylist of physically attacking her at the Cannes Film Festival, with the incident leaving her with facial injuries after an apparent altercation in a hotel room.

item.title: "Days Of Abusing H-1B Visas Are Over": US Highlights Trump's Policies' 'Success'

media:content.media:description: US said new policies introduced under Trump are already showing results

item.description: The US Citizenship and Immigration Services claimed that new policies introduced under US President Donald Trump are already showing results.
item.content:encoded: The US Citizenship and Immigration Services claimed that new policies introduced under US President Donald Trump are already showing results.

item.title: Inside Israel's High-Tech 'Kill-Or-Capture' Mission After October 7 Attack

media:content.media:description: In the assault, around 1,200 people were killed, and 251 others were taken hostage

item.description: The report says Israel is targeting people at every level, from senior Hamas commanders to individuals accused of carrying out smaller roles during the attack.
item.content:encoded: The report says Israel is targeting people at every level, from senior Hamas commanders to individuals accused of carrying out smaller roles during the attack.

item.title: Work-From-Home Refusal Can Trigger Lawsuits, Rules UK Tribunal In Anxiety Case

media:content.media:description: Legal experts say this decision sends a clear message to UK employers.

item.description: The tribunal found the council failed to make reasonable adjustments for her mental health condition, setting a significant legal precedent for remote-working rights.
item.content:encoded: The tribunal found the council failed to make reasonable adjustments for her mental health condition, setting a significant legal precedent for remote-working rights.

item.title: Did Chinese General Disguise As Waitress To Spy On Elon Musk? What Report Said

media:content.media:description: This isn't the first time Zeng has accused Beijing of espionage.

item.description: Zeng shared an image of two servers from the CCP's state banquet honouring President Trump, claiming photos of the same women "in uniform" were being widely circulated on Chinese social media.
item.content:encoded: Zeng shared an image of two servers from the CCP's state banquet honouring President Trump, claiming photos of the same women "in uniform" were being widely circulated on Chinese social media.

item.title: Farmers Turn to Human Urine After Fertiliser Crunch From Iran War

media:content.media:description: The crisis is giving fresh momentum to products that have long struggled to gain widespread adoption

item.description: Farmers worldwide are under pressure. About a third of traded urea, a widely used nitrogen fertilizer, comes from the Gulf region.
item.content:encoded: Farmers worldwide are under pressure. About a third of traded urea, a widely used nitrogen fertilizer, comes from the Gulf region.

item.title: This Indian-Origin Investor Could Earn $128 Billion From SpaceX IPO
item.description: SpaceX IPO: If SpaceX listing succeeds, it could make Elon Musk world's first trillionaire. And the Indian-origin investor may rake in billions.
item.content:encoded: SpaceX IPO: If SpaceX listing succeeds, it could make Elon Musk world's first trillionaire. And the Indian-origin investor may rake in billions.

item.title: Iran In Talks With Oman For Permanent Hormuz Toll System

media:content.media:description: Asked about the plan, US President Donald Trump rejected it.

item.description: Situated between Iran to its north and Oman to the south, the strait connects the Persian Gulf to the Indian Ocean and normally handles a fifth of the world's oil and liquefied natural gas supplies, as well as other commodities such as aluminium and
item.content:encoded: Situated between Iran to its north and Oman to the south, the strait connects the Persian Gulf to the Indian Ocean and normally handles a fifth of the world's oil and liquefied natural gas supplies, as well as other commodities such as aluminium and

item.title: Meet The Key Allies Of Elon Musk Set To Turn Billionaires After SpaceX IPO

media:content.media:description: Elon Musk's reshaping of SpaceX, xAI and X has yielded a significant financial windfall

item.description: Aside from Musk, the individual with the largest directly held position reported on the company's prospectus is Luke Nosek, a co-founder of PayPal and an early institutional investor in SpaceX.
item.content:encoded: Aside from Musk, the individual with the largest directly held position reported on the company's prospectus is Luke Nosek, a co-founder of PayPal and an early institutional investor in SpaceX.

item.title: A 'Band Of Brothers' Is Running Iran With Mojtaba Khamenei: Report

media:content.media:description: Some men who had some personal connection with Mojtaba Khamenei are running Iran

item.description: Experts point out that their shared backgrounds, careers and ideological outlook are the reasons why neither the war nor the collapse of the government and assassinations of around 50 top political and military leaders could paralyse Tehran.
item.content:encoded: Experts point out that their shared backgrounds, careers and ideological outlook are the reasons why neither the war nor the collapse of the government and assassinations of around 50 top political and military leaders could paralyse Tehran.

item.title: Texas Sues WhatsApp, Meta Over Data Access, Encryption Claims

media:content.media:description: Lawsuit seeks a court order barring Meta and WhatsApp from accessing Texans' WhatsApp messages

item.description: The lawsuit says WhatsApp and Meta falsely assure users that WhatsApp messages are encrypted despite having access to "virtually all" private communications on the messaging app.
item.content:encoded: The lawsuit says WhatsApp and Meta falsely assure users that WhatsApp messages are encrypted despite having access to "virtually all" private communications on the messaging app.

item.title: UN Flags 'Grave Concern' Over Taliban Law Allowing Child Marriage

media:content.media:description: The government rejected the accusations, saying the decree follows Islamic law

item.description: Women and girls face widespread discrimination in Afghanistan, with laws dictating how they must dress and behave. They are banned from secondary school and universities and from most jobs
item.content:encoded: Women and girls face widespread discrimination in Afghanistan, with laws dictating how they must dress and behave. They are banned from secondary school and universities and from most jobs

item.title: "We Can Do Without A Lot Of Drama": EU On Climate Talks At UN In Turkey

media:content.media:description: EU's approach to COP31 is subject of debate among the 27 member states

item.description: European countries were deeply frustrated by last year's COP30 climate conference in Brazil, which produced a watered-down final text that lacked any explicit mention of a fossil-fuel transition.
item.content:encoded: European countries were deeply frustrated by last year's COP30 climate conference in Brazil, which produced a watered-down final text that lacked any explicit mention of a fossil-fuel transition.

item.title: What Is GAESA, A Military Conglomerate At Centre Of US-Cuba Tensions

media:content.media:description: Cuba's leadership rarely talks publicly about GAESA

item.description: GAESA stands for Grupo de Administracion Empresarial - or 'business administration group.' It is a sprawling conglomerate of military-run businesses, widely seen as the island's most profitable and efficient.
item.content:encoded: GAESA stands for Grupo de Administracion Empresarial - or 'business administration group.' It is a sprawling conglomerate of military-run businesses, widely seen as the island's most profitable and efficient.
